code:
import string

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> String
  mut errors = ""
  mut count = 0
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errors = "empty-name"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age < 0
    if count > 0
      errors = "#{errors},negative-age"
    else
      errors = "negative-age"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age > 150
    if count > 0
      errors = "#{errors},too-old"
    else
      errors = "too-old"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  errors
end

fn report(_ errs: String) -> Unit
  if string.is_empty(errs)
    print("ok")
  else
    print("errors=#{errs}")
  end
end

report(validate("", -5))
report(validate("Alice", 30))
report(validate("Bob", 200))
